feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1983 201 1782 87
TR 1831 172 1659 72

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.
Ranking App Number of Discounts

entry.title: Iron Marines Invasion RTS Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺149,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺149,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

In-App Purchases

  • Hero Dragon Kosmos：₺399,99
  • All Unit Groups：₺699,99
  • Hero Red Dragon On Sale：₺199,99
  • All Heroes：₺799,99
  • Unit Group Rebooted Ascendii：₺149,99
  • Unit Group Jaegers：₺399,99
  • Hero Dragon Kosmos On Sale：₺249,99
  • Hero Red Dragon：₺299,99
  • Special Daily Pack7：₺99,99
  • Unit Group Ascendii On Sale：₺49,99

Application Description

Discover and conquer countless worlds across deep space. Unravel a story full of challenges and threats that will lead you across the galaxy on an extraordinary voyage. Nothing lasts long in deep space, and peace is not an exception! Welcome to Iron Marines: Invasion! Enjoy unique stage missions and special operations in exciting new worlds, each one with its own particular terrain, style, enemies, and conditions. Learn how to beat them one by one! Command the Federation’s troops across the galaxy, with the aid of Heroes & Units that will allow you to boost your RTS game skills to the limit. Battle extraordinary enemies and ferocious alien creatures in fun and electrifying missions. Plan your strategy to defend the peace in the galaxy! For all Iron Marines & SciFi action fans who get the kicks of offline RTS games and strategy games. Become the tactical specialist you’re meant to be by leading your own army in thrilling, mind-blowing missions. The invasion is at our gates! Lead the fiercest combat corps across the galaxy. Fight side by side with the Federation’s toughest Marines! Now you can combine your squad and take advantage of each Unit’s unique fighting skills: from ranger to snipers, mechas, missile launchers, or fearsome alien warrior clans. Train jaw-dropping heroes and their useful abilities: from boosting up your army’s morale and firepower to increase their stamina and reach, or detecting upcoming enemies before they attack you. Help them join the fight to keep peace among the worlds! Become an expert on the galaxy’s biggest mysteries! Use an in-game Encyclopedia to understand the worlds you explore or identify the enemies you face. Take advantage of the tactical info available to configure your strategic game plan. Check all the amazing features of this real-time strategy space odyssey: - An entire galaxy to be discovered. - 25+ campaign missions that will take you to the most incredible worlds. Tons of planets for you to explore and defend by planning a tight strategic game plan! - 75+ special operations for you to upgrade your Marine abilities to the peak level. - 10 Unit groups for a total of 24 different troops. You can even combine your backup depending on the mission and strategy you’re planning to deploy. - 9 powerful heroes with strong skills for you to train. Help them become the Galaxy’s finest! - 8 Special Weapons to boost your army tactics to the stars! Set your game plan and take advantage of instant weapons like bouncers, toxic bombs, or even drone factories. - 40 Upgrades to improve your strategy and empower your units with defense drones, napalm rockets, ricocheting blasts and much more. - 20+ Achievements to show how much of a real-time strategy expert you’ve become! - Choose your difficulty mode for the best RTS games experience: Casual, Normal, or Veteran. And if you think you’ve seen it all across the galaxy… the impossible mode - only for the elite players, available offline! - Prove yourself in daily challenges and collect amazing rewards. - Play rts games offline: Enjoy the awesome real-time strategy experience anywhere, as you explore incredible worlds. Iron Marines Invasion will give you hours of colorful, fun gameplay in this epic real-time strategy space odyssey, available to play offline.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Titan Quest: Legendary Edition
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺119,99 → ₺54,99 [₺54,99 ~ ₺119,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺54,99

In-App Purchases

  • Eternal Embers DLC：₺19,99
  • Ragnarök for free download：₺0,00
  • Atlantis for free download：₺0,00

Application Description

Titan Quest has captivated legions of players since its 2006 debut. You get the all-encompassing experience of an unbridled, truly heroic journey through the worlds of Titan Quest! Your honorable quest is to save the world! The gods alone cannot defeat the Titans, so real heroes are needed - and that can only be you! Your success or failure will decide the fate of the people and the Olympians! With your custom-created hero, scour the mystical and ancient worlds of Greece, Egypt, Babylon, and China. Conquer the hordes of legendary creatures and master various weapons and martial arts: Archery, sword fighting, or the use of powerful magic! Travel a world of antiquity and Nordic mythology! Battle the beasts of mythology as you travel to the Parthenon, the Great Pyramids, the Hanging Gardens of Babylon, the Great Wall, the Tartarus Arena, and other famous places. Encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, discover the uncharted lands of northern Europe, search for the mythical kingdom of Atlantis, and set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean. It’s all or nothing on your glorious path! With each challenge that awaits you, you'll have to defeat bigger and stronger enemies until you reach your goal and force the Titans to their knees! Rush into battle alongside brave pet companions! Find extraordinary items with special powers that will enhance your abilities and help you on your path. Legendary swords, powerful lightning spells, magical, bows and numerous other treasures with unimaginable powers await you - all of them are at your disposal in your battles and spread fear and terror among the hideous creatures! What are you waiting for? Like no other game in the Action RPG genre, Titan Quest: Legendary Edition combines the fascinating world of mythology with endless and exciting action that you would expect from such a compelling game! Features: + Within the world of the Immortal Throne DLC, you’ll encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, brave the attacks of Cerberus, and hazard the banks of the River Styx. You have to interpret the prophecies of the blind seer Tiresias, fight alongside Agamemnon and Achilles, and use the wiles of Odysseus to conquer this dark new adventure. + In the uncharted lands of northern Europe in the Ragnarök DLC, you’ll brave the realms of the Celts, the Northmen, and the Asgardian gods! + Meet an explorer in the Atlantis DLC, in search of the mythical kingdom of Atlantis. A key is supposedly hidden in the diary of Herakles, which is rumored to be located in the Phoenician City of Gadir. Set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean, including the Tartarus Arena for epic battles! + All important updates have been implemented to the technically overhauled Titan Quest to grant the best gaming experience of this classic ever! + ETERNAL EMBERS DLCs available as in-app purchase - Summoned by the legendary Emperor Yao, the Hero is called back into the East to deal with a demonic threat that has been ravaging the land after the Telkine was slain. ! A note for all players who own the base version of Titan Quest: The DLCs mentioned here are also available for purchase as additional content so that all fans can upgrade their game to fully enjoy all expansions! © www.handy-games.com GmbH

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Subnautica
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺399,99 → ₺199,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺199,99

Application Description

*Make sure to check if your device is supported before playing Subnautica!* Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. A massive, open world full of wonder and peril awaits you! Descend into the depths, craft equipment, pilot submarines and out-smart wildlife to explore lush coral reefs, volcanoes, cave systems, and more - all while trying to survive. Unravel the mystery of this world teeming with creatures, both friendly and hostile, scattered with clues from a previous time. Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. FEATURES • SURVIVE - After crash landing on a vast underwater planet, the clock is ticking to find water, food, and to develop the equipment you need to explore. • EXPLORE - Manage your hunger, thirst, and oxygen supply as you dive into towering kelp forests, sunlit plateaus, bio-luminescent reefs, and winding cave systems. • SCAVENGE - Collect resources from the ocean around you. Venture deeper and further to find rarer resources, allowing you to craft more advanced items. • CRAFT - Build bases to shelter in, vehicles to pilot, tools for survival to aid you in navigating and adapting to this subaquatic landscape. • DISCOVER - What happened to this planet? What caused you to crash? Can you find a way to make it off the planet alive? • CUSTOMIZE - Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE • Revamped interface – exclusive mobile UI with complete touch control • Game Center achievements • Cloud Save – Share your progress between iOS devices • Compatible with MFi controllers • iPhone 16 Optimization (including Pro Max) ----- *DEVICES NOT SUPPORTED (THE GAME WON'T WORK)*: - iPhone Xr, iPhone SE Gen 2 (2020) - iPad Mini Gen 5, iPad Air Gen 3, iPad Gen 8, iPad Gen 9 *SUPPORTED DEVICES ON LOW RESOLUTION ONLY*: - iPhone Xs, iPhone Xs Max, iPhone 11, iPhone 11 Pro, iPhone 11 Pro Max, iPhone 12, iPhone 12 Mini, iPhone 13, iPhone 13 Mini, iPhone SE Gen 3 (2022) - iPad Pro 10.5", iPad Mini Gen 6, iPad Air Gen 4, iPad Gen 10, iPad Pro 11" Gen 1, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 3 *SUPPORTED DEVICES* : - iPhone 12 Pro, iPhone 12 Pro Max, iPhone 13 Pro, iPhone 13 Pro Max, iPhone 14 AND ABOVE - iPad Pro 11" Gen 2, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 4, iPad Air Gen 5, iPad Pro 11" Gen 3, iPad Pro 11" Gen 4, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 5, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 6 AND ABOVE

entry.title: Remote, Mouse & Keyboard Pro
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺1.999,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺1.999,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

# REMOTE, MOUSE & KEYBOARD — YOUR ALL-IN-ONE CONTROL CENTER Turn your iPhone or iPad into a universal remote, wireless mouse, keyboard, and automation hub — all in one powerful app. With Remote, Mouse & Keyboard, you can control your Apple TV, Mac, Windows PC, or even another iPad seamlessly over Wi-Fi or Bluetooth. Whether you’re streaming, presenting, or working remotely — take full control of your digital world. # APPLE TV REMOTE — SIMPLE AND INTUITIVE No more lost remotes or endless scrolling. Connect via Wi-Fi and take charge of your Apple TV with ease. - Works with all Apple TV models - Control volume, playback, and media functions - Navigate with a smooth touchpad - Type comfortably with the built-in keyboard - Launch apps instantly from your device (Older Apple TV models such as Gen 1–3 require one-time PIN entry using a physical remote.) Your iPhone becomes the most advanced Apple TV remote ever. # COMPUTER CONTROL — MAC & WINDOWS Take full command of your computer — Mac or Windows — directly from your iPhone or iPad. Designed for productivity, comfort, and speed. Remote Control & Media: - Adjust volume, playback, and tracks - Use pre-made control panels for popular apps and websites - Create custom control panels for any software Mouse & Keyboard: - Turn your device into a wireless mouse and keyboard - View your computer screen live on your phone or tablet - Capture screenshots remotely - Use gestures like scroll and zoom Apps & Automation: - Launch or quit apps, access menus, and trigger shortcuts - Integrate Siri Shortcuts and Timers - Perform system actions — sleep, restart, logout, and more - Create custom automation scripts - Open websites in your preferred browser - Manage all scheduled actions in one place Requirements: - macOS 10.13 or newer or Windows 7 or newer - Free helper app download: https://rs.ltd/get Your all-in-one remote desktop and input tool — secure, fast, and intuitive. # IPAD CONTROL — DUAL-DEVICE BRILLIANCE Use your iPhone to control another iPad via Bluetooth. Perfect for multitasking, streaming, or creative setups. - Adjust volume and playback - Type and navigate using keyboard and touchpad Your iPhone becomes the perfect companion for your iPad. # WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT - All-in-one app for Apple TV, Mac, Windows, and iPad - Customizable control panels and shortcuts - Live screen view for real-time interaction - Siri & Shortcuts integration - Timer automation for smart workflows - Secure Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connections - Free companion helper app for computers - Clean, intuitive iOS design # SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS - Apple TV: All models supported - Mac: macOS 10.13 or later - Windows: Windows 7 or later - iPad: Bluetooth connection supported - Helper app download: https://rs.ltd/get # THE FUTURE OF CONTROL Stop juggling remotes and keyboards — unify them. From managing your Mac or PC to pausing your Apple TV or typing on your iPad, Remote, Mouse & Keyboard makes control effortless. Smart. Seamless. Powerful. Take control — with Remote, Mouse & Keyboard.

entry.title: CD’ci: Oyun Al-Sat
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺9,99 → ₺2,99 [₺2,99 ~ ₺29,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺2,99

Application Description

Küçük bir oyun dükkânıyla başlayın ve onu başarılı bir işletmeye dönüştürün. Gün boyunca dükkânınıza farklı müşteriler gelir. Bazıları eski oyunlarını satmak isterken, bazıları ise koleksiyonlarına ekleyecek özel parçalar arar. Amacınız akıllı anlaşmalar yapmak, doğru fiyata alım yapmak ve kâr ederek satmaktır. Her oyun farklıdır. Bazılarını bulmak kolaydır, bazıları ise çok daha nadir ve değerlidir. Kutunun ve diskin durumu da büyük önem taşır, bu yüzden her ürünü dikkatlice incelemek işin önemli bir parçasıdır. Bir anlaşma yapmadan önce detaylara bakmalı, müşterinin teklifini değerlendirmeli ve karşı teklif vermeye değip değmeyeceğine karar vermelisiniz. Bazen tek bir iyi pazarlık bile büyük fark yaratabilir. Daha fazla para kazandıkça dükkânınız büyümeye başlar. İşinizi geliştirebilir, daha iyi ticaretler yapabilir ve zamanla daha güçlü bir koleksiyon oluşturabilirsiniz. Oyun; ikinci el oyun ticaretini, basit pazarlık mekaniklerini, detaylı ürün durumlarını ve sıcak bir retro pixel art tarzını bir araya getirerek keyifli bir dükkân yönetimi deneyimi sunar. Dükkânınızı büyütün, daha iyi anlaşmalar yapın, harika oyunlar toplayın ve gerçek bir CD’ci olun.

entry.title: RallyPin
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • ERC Royal Rally of Scandinavia 2026：₺149,99
  • Pihtla RT Saaremaa Sprintralli 2026：₺99,99
  • WRC Vodafone Rally de Portugal 2026：₺149,99
  • D1 Rallye de Wallonie 2026：₺149,99
  • WRC Rally Islas Canarias 2026：₺149,99
  • D1 TAC Rally 2026：₺149,99
  • ERC Rally Sierra Morena 2026：₺149,99
  • WRC Crotia Rally 2026：₺199,99
  • D2 Rallye des Ardennes 2026：₺149,99
  • WRC Safari Rally Kenya 2026：₺199,99

Application Description

RallyPin – Your Ultimate Rally Companion! Get closer to the action with RallyPin, the must-have app for rally fans! Top features: - interactive rally maps - spectator areas with pictures - built-in one-click navigation - unique navigation algorithm - never through the stages - timetables and entrants - live results

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: CD’ci: Oyun Al-Sat
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺19,99 → ₺9,99 [₺5,99 ~ ₺29,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺9,99

Application Description

Küçük bir oyun dükkânıyla başlayın ve onu başarılı bir işletmeye dönüştürün. Gün boyunca dükkânınıza farklı müşteriler gelir. Bazıları eski oyunlarını satmak isterken, bazıları ise koleksiyonlarına ekleyecek özel parçalar arar. Amacınız akıllı anlaşmalar yapmak, doğru fiyata alım yapmak ve kâr ederek satmaktır. Her oyun farklıdır. Bazılarını bulmak kolaydır, bazıları ise çok daha nadir ve değerlidir. Kutunun ve diskin durumu da büyük önem taşır, bu yüzden her ürünü dikkatlice incelemek işin önemli bir parçasıdır. Bir anlaşma yapmadan önce detaylara bakmalı, müşterinin teklifini değerlendirmeli ve karşı teklif vermeye değip değmeyeceğine karar vermelisiniz. Bazen tek bir iyi pazarlık bile büyük fark yaratabilir. Daha fazla para kazandıkça dükkânınız büyümeye başlar. İşinizi geliştirebilir, daha iyi ticaretler yapabilir ve zamanla daha güçlü bir koleksiyon oluşturabilirsiniz. Oyun; ikinci el oyun ticaretini, basit pazarlık mekaniklerini, detaylı ürün durumlarını ve sıcak bir retro pixel art tarzını bir araya getirerek keyifli bir dükkân yönetimi deneyimi sunar. Dükkânınızı büyütün, daha iyi anlaşmalar yapın, harika oyunlar toplayın ve gerçek bir CD’ci olun.

entry.title: Code Blue CPR – ALS Timer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺49,99 [Free ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

Code Blue is a professional CPR and ALS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters. Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes. Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow. ### Core Features ### DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS - Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals - High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded REAL-TIME EVENT LOG - Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions - Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING - Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality ### Fully Customizable for Your Practice ### CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES - Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS Configure the app as a simple CPR timer Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour ### First Responder & Post-Code Tools ### FIRST RESPONDER MODE - Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest - Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT - Save previous codes - Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review ### Evidence-Based Flowcharts ### ALS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES - Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts - Based on ALS and Post-Resuscitation Care guidelines from AHA and ERC ### Built for Healthcare Professionals ### Designed for use in: - Emergency Departments - ICUs - Wards - Prehospital and first-responder settings Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation. ### Support & Legal ### For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact: Customer Support: suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy End User License Agreement (EULA): https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

Application Screenshot

iPad
